description: Machine-readable integration evidence freshness manifest (Bastion B13). Backs docs/INTEGRATION_EVIDENCE_TABLE.md and is gated by ci/check_integration_evidence.py (also audit_gate.py --integration-evidence). Each row binds an external-integration surface (libbitcoin / Bitcoin Core / libsecp shim) to its committed evidence, a reproduce command, a freshness SLO, and a severity. CAAS uses this to know whether each surface is current (pass), stale, missing, or owner_gated. Full-chain Bitcoin/libbitcoin validation is owner_gated: it must be an explicit manual / owner-imported artifact, never silently treated as current evidence.

severity_legend.blocking: Cheap, every-push evidence that must always be current; missing evidence_path or stale last_verified fails the gate.
severity_legend.warning: Committed test/gate that runs in standard CI; staleness/missing is advisory (non-blocking) and pre-alerted.
severity_legend.owner_gated: Heavy / manual full-chain validation. Reported explicitly and never counted as current evidence; the owner must re-verify and import the result. Staleness is surfaced as informational, not a block.

rows.surface: libsecp256k1 shim parity (strict-parse boundaries, no permissive from_bytes)
rows.notes: 17/17 shim parity checks pass; runs on every push. Verified 2026-06-13.

rows.surface: cross-libsecp256k1 differential (bit-exact verdict vs bitcoin-core/libsecp256k1 v0.6.0)
rows.notes: Hard gate in the Security Audit workflow (cross-libsecp256k1 job) on every push.

rows.surface: DER parse + normalize + verify, incl. evoskuil/libbitcoin block 704,789 regression
rows.notes: Permanent regression evidence for block 704,789 DER parse/normalize/repeat-verify.

rows.surface: same-X / opposite-Y ECDSA cache identity (02||X vs 03||X must not share a cached key)
rows.notes: Regression for the ShimEcdsaCache full-pubkey (X||Y) identity fix (commit 684141e7).

rows.surface: Schnorr verify (BIP-340) x-only key + variable-length message semantics vs shim
rows.notes: Schnorr boundary covered by the shim parity gate; verified 2026-06-13.

rows.surface: batch ECDSA/Schnorr verify (CPU + optional GPU) vs shim reference
rows.notes: Heavy libbitcoin-bridge batch-verify path; owner-gated manual validation, not run on every push.
In-place collect verify, BIP-341 commitment, threshold paths. Owner-gated heavy validation.

rows.surface: libbitcoin no-libsecp build mode (bridge builds + validates with libsecp256k1 absent)
rows.notes: Core build-mode gate runs in CI as a proxy; the full libbitcoin no-libsecp build is owner-gated heavy validation.

rows.surface: Bitcoin Core full test suite with UltrafastSecp256k1 as secondary backend (749/749 GCC 14.2.0)
rows.reproduce_command: see the 'reproduction' field in docs/BITCOIN_CORE_TEST_RESULTS.json (git apply INTEGRATION_PATCH + ctest)
rows.notes: Full 5-7h chain validation; owner-gated imported artifact. Earlier Clang 19.1.7 v28.0 run = 693/693 (history).
